title: Shield
description: Tired of being oneshotted? Worry no more! (prolly)
body:
Are you tired of being oneshotted (most likely by creepers or fall damage)?

Worry no more! (prolly)
With this scuffed mod, You can: 
- Avoid most damage with 20 - 25 extra hp.
- It also can survive /kill (gotta fix that soon)
- Can be configured with gamerules (max amount and whatnot)
- Some damage IS ignored such as the void
- Some things will deal 2x or more damage such as poison (the only one atm)
- Possibly more that I forgot since i made this mod months ago
